name: TestJoinLinHeaderEvent
title: TestJoinLinHeaderEvent
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event. This function does not wait.

parameters.name: aFrame
parameters.description: Frame whose header should be awaited.

parameters.name: aFrameId
parameters.description: Numeric ID of a frame whose header should be awaited.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
